articles.title: Bird flu could be catastrophic for nation's vulnerable species, experts warn
articles.excerpt: The black swan, the Tasmanian devil and Australian sea lions are among the species at risk if a deadly strain of avian influenza takes hold in Australia, experts are warning.

The outlook could be grim for Australia's wildlife if a deadly strain of bird flu spreads to ducks, ecology experts are warning.
